name: zen-readify-microservices
description: Microservices backend for Zen Readify application.
author: Praveen Patel

scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:books" "npm run start:search" "npm run start:reviews" "npm run start:categories" "npm run start:gateway"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "nodemon gateway/index.js" "nodemon bookService/index.js" "nodemon searchService/index.js" "nodemon reviewService/index.js"  "nodemon categoryService/index.js"
